event_types.name: Human Decision
event_types.description: An operational event initiated by an individual human agent.

event_types.name: Institutional Decision
event_types.description: An operational event generated by an institutional entity such as a government body, organization, or administrative system.

event_types.name: AI Decision
event_types.description: An operational event generated by an artificial intelligence system executing a decision within a defined operational context.

event_types.name: Autonomous System Action
event_types.description: An operational event generated by an autonomous machine such as a robot, drone, or automated infrastructure.

event_types.name: Distributed System Event
event_types.description: An operational event produced through interactions between multiple interconnected systems.
